# TinyOps Studio LLC

> Fixed-scope, public-safe workflow reviews and automation services with PayPal or Whop checkout after the stated intake step.

Canonical catalog: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/services.html
Machine-readable offers: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/offers.json
Full synthetic QA sample: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/sample-booking-qa.html
Public-source USD 10 audit: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/
Detailed USD 149 automation audit: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/automation-audit.html
Automation incident evidence USD 10 trial: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/automation-incident-evidence.html
Pre-migration architecture audit EUR 125: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/pre-migration-architecture-audit.html
Scope confirmation email: zhangmacmini@gmail.com

## Affiliate program

- TinyOps Studio Affiliate Program: 50% of the USD 49 Quick Workflow Triage at the current full price (USD 24.50 share).
- Public terms: https://tinyopsstudio.com/affiliates
- Join on Whop: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/affiliates
- Cookie duration is not publicly specified. Affiliates must disclose the relationship and avoid spam, self-referrals, and unsupported claims. Whop administers participation and payouts; earnings are not guaranteed.

## Core offers

- Free: Workflow Automation ROI Calculator. Browser-based directional estimate; no production data required. Open: https://tinyopsstudio.com/automation-roi-calculator
- USD 10: Public-Source Value Audit. One public earning opportunity or automation route; GO, HOLD, or NO-GO decision with current evidence and one next action. Confirm scope: mailto:zhangmacmini@gmail.com. Pay after scope confirmation: https://paypal.me/binhai2001/10
- USD 10: Automation Incident Evidence Trial. One fully synthetic or sanitized incident; expected-versus-observed timeline, evidence gaps, retry/idempotency risks, and acceptance checklist within 24 hours after complete intake. Scope: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/automation-incident-evidence.html. Sample: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/automation-incident-evidence-sample.html. Confirm scope: mailto:zhangmacmini@gmail.com.
- USD 29: n8n, Make, Zapier & AI Workflow Automation Starter Kit. Self-serve planning guide, checklists, prompt library, patterns, templates, and launch review. Purchase: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/ai-automation-starter-kit-94/
- USD 49: n8n Workflow Help - Quick Triage. One bounded workflow issue; written delivery within two business days. Purchase: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/quick-workflow-triage/
- EUR 125: Pre-Migration Automation Architecture Audit. One sanitized n8n, CRM, messaging, enrichment, or LLM stack; boundary map, reliability review, dry-run acceptance plan, ranked risks, and one phase-one specification. No implementation or production access. Scope: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/pre-migration-architecture-audit.html. Confirm scope: mailto:zhangmacmini@gmail.com.
- USD 149: Make Workflow Kickoff Review. Plan one Make.com workflow before implementation. Purchase: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/make-workflow-kickoff-review/
- USD 149: AI Workflow Automation Audit. Review up to three workflows and receive one implementation-ready specification. Purchase: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/ai-workflow-automation-audit/
- USD 499: Make Workflow Rescue Sprint. Repair one existing Make path, up to 20 modules. Purchase: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/make-workflow-rescue-sprint/
- USD 1,000: Workflow Automation Sprint. Build one defined workflow with up to two connected tools. Purchase: https://whop.com/tinyops-studio-llc/ai-agent-workflow-sprint/

Suggested path: free directional estimate, USD 10 bounded written trial, USD 29 self-serve planning, USD 49 bounded triage, USD 149 written review or audit, then a rescue or build sprint only when implementation is justified.

## Safety and scope

Initial intake must use public, synthetic, or fully sanitized material. Do not send passwords, OTPs, API keys, cookies, production credentials, payment-card data, wallet secrets, KYC/tax documents, or unredacted customer data through public pages. Exact inclusions, exclusions, and delivery timing are stated on each Whop product page. No revenue, performance, model-accuracy, legal, compliance, or security-certification guarantee is offered.
Automation incident evidence use case: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/automation-incident-evidence.html
Fully synthetic incident evidence sample: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/automation-incident-evidence-sample.html
Synthetic candidate intake CRM reliability sample: https://ideals2201.github.io/ai-monkey-value-audit/candidate-intake-crm-sample.html
